items.name: Heart Eyes
items.description:
Add a touch of love and whimsy to your character with these heart-shaped eyes that pop out of your character’s head! This adorable accessory is perfect for expressing your affection and playful personality. Whether you’re celebrating a special occasion or just want to spread some joy, these heart eyes are sure to make a statement. Ideal for any outfit, this unique and eye-catching item is a must-have for any Roblox player.  Shop For More Here: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=11&Subcategory=19&CreatorName=BrickEffect&salesTypeFilter=1

items.name: Jamiera Cat's "I <3 さば" Graphic
items.description:
Sized to fit on blank shirts.

The graphic seen on Jamiera Cat's (Titan Cat True Form) white T-shirt. 
Japanese characters translate to "Mackerel". Their font is AR明朝体U Regular, but since I couldn't find a free one, I used Soukou Mincho and modified it a bit to match how it looks on Jamiera Cat.

For the letter "I" and heart, I just drew them.

From the game "The Battle Cats"

items.name: Pink Bandage
items.description:
Love this item? 🌟 Check out my other creations here:
👀 Profile: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=1&CreatorName=Christocream&salesTypeFilter=1
🤝 Group: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=1&CreatorName=Christocreams+Paradise&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1

🎉 Don't forget to favorite for a lower price!

Add a soft, adorable touch with the Pink Bandage — a cute aesthetic face accessory made to elevate your avatar’s look. Whether worn as a nose bandage or cheek bandage, this pastel pink detail blends kawaii charm with a clean, minimal design. From light pink and baby pink to hot pink and bubblegum tones, this stylish bandaid adds personality while keeping your fit subtle and polished. Perfect for Y2K and preppy outfits, soft pastel aesthetics, anime cosplay, or creating that “injured but cute” vibe. Pair it with streetwear, cozy fits, or character roleplay looks to enhance your avatar customization with a small but eye-catching detail.

items.name: Red Ski Goggles with Neck Scarf
items.description:
Bold, intense, and winter-ready. These red ski goggles with a matching neck scarf bring strong color and sharp style to your avatar. Perfect for snow fits, sporty looks, and eye-catching winter aesthetics. Cosmetic only, made purely for visual style.

Purchase more of this here:
https://www.roblox.com/communities/14186463/Social-UGC#!/about

items.name: Ugly Graphic Tee [Changes Color]

The graphic was generated by a old and bad AI.
